mission.title: thanos: Added binary index header implementation.
mission.description:
This PR adds index-header implementation based on [this design](https://thanos.io/proposals/201912_thanos_binary_index_header.md/). 

It adds a separate `indexheader.Binary*` structs and methods allowing to build and read index-header in binary format.

Fixes: https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/1711
Fixes: https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/1873
Fixes: https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/1750
Fixes: https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/1655
Fixes: https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/1471
Fixes: https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/1455
Fixes: https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/942
Fixes: https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/448
Fixes: https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/1750

cc @brian-brazil @codesome as you are super familiar with the TSDB format.
cc @pracucci

-rw-r--r-- 1 bwplotka bwplotka  23K

resolution.summary:
Looks like `index.fileWriter` is well-scoped, so I would like to expose it for Thanos to use. Used in: https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/1952 (: 

Sometimes, copying a dep is easier, but we already depend on index package heavily so we can reuse more (: Hope that makes sense @brian-brazil 

Signed-off-by: Bartlomiej Plotka <bwplotka@gmail.com>
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
